mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_notice_info n WHERE n.status = 1 AND n.delete_flag = 0 AND (n.expire_time IS NULL OR n.expire_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_notice_read r WHERE r.notice_id = n.id AND r.user_id = #{userId} )

SELECT n.id, n.title, n.notice_type AS noticeType, n.level, n.publish_time AS publishTime, TO_CHAR(n.create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createTime, CASE WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS readFlag FROM sys_notice_info n LEFT JOIN sys_notice_read r ON r.notice_id = n.id AND r.user_id = #{userId} WHERE n.status = 1 AND n.delete_flag = 0 AND (n.expire_time IS NULL OR n.expire_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY n.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_notice_read (id, notice_id, user_id, read_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{noticeId}, #{userId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (user_id, notice_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO sys_notice_read (id, notice_id, user_id, read_time) SELECT NEXTVAL('seq_sys_notice_read') AS id, n.id, #{userId} AS user_id, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS read_time FROM sys_notice_info n WHERE n.status = 1 AND n.delete_flag = 0 AND (n.expire_time IS NULL OR n.expire_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_notice_read r WHERE r.notice_id = n.id AND r.user_id = #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_notice_read WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND user_id = #{userId}
